The '''BlasTech light repeating blaster''' was a [[Light repeating blaster/Legends|light repeating blaster]] produced by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]], and was a smaller version of the [[T-21 light repeating blaster/Legends|T-21 light repeating blaster]].

==History==
Based on a successful riot gun design used by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]], this weapon was known for its high rate of fire in a small package. Due to the weapon's small size, it could be used as a support weapon, or as a soldier's service weapon. This gave [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|SpecForces]] the stopping power and rate of fire of larger and more awkward models of [[Repeating blaster/Legends|repeating blasters]].
